title: Peruvian-Style Grilled Chicken
description: Enjoy the bold flavors of Peru with this grilled chicken recipe, marinated in a zesty mixture of aji amarillo peppers and spices.

ingredients.name: Aji amarillo peppers
ingredients.notes: dried, crushed or 2-3 fresh peppers, seeded and chopped

ingredients.name: Peruvian la brasa seasoning
ingredients.notes: or substitute with a mix of paprika, garlic powder, and cumin

instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, combine aji amarillo peppers, Peruvian la brasa seasoning, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
2. In a large ziplock bag, combine the marinade, olive oil, and chicken. Seal the bag and massage to coat the chicken evenly. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
3. Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Remove the chicken from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
4. Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
5. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, mix together diced tomatoes and a squeeze of lime juice.
6. Once the chicken is cooked, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
7. Serve the grilled chicken with the tomato salsa spooned over the top.
